name: reports_digest
description: 用 finance-bot@bytedance.com 的身份发送财务周报、月度简报等邮件。收件人列表从 finance-leadership@ 别名解析。

actions.name: send_email
actions.description: Compose and send an email (supports HTML body + attachments)

actions.name: draft_email
actions.description: Save a draft without sending — user reviews first

actions.name: list_labels
actions.description: Return the authenticated account's label tree

_demo_note: UniSpace demo does not actually send mail. Any send_email / draft_email invocation is logged and echoed back. In production this would use the Gmail API with the stored OAuth refresh token.
